proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: CategoryEquivalence[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x2: Functor[T2, T3, T0, T1], x3: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T0, T1], x4: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T0, T1], x5: NaturalTransformation[T2, T3, T2, T3], x6: NaturalTransformation[T2, T3, T2, T3]) { Option.some[CategoryEquivalence[T0, T1, T2, T3]](x0) != CategoryEquivalence.new[T0, T1, T2, T3](x1, x2, x3, x4, x5, x6) or x0.forward = x1 }[O1, M1, O2, M2](e, forward, backward, unit_fwd, unit_bwd, counit_fwd, counit_bwd)

function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: CategoryEquivalence[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x2: Functor[T2, T3, T0, T1], x3: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T0, T1], x4: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T0, T1], x5: NaturalTransformation[T2, T3, T2, T3], x6: NaturalTransformation[T2, T3, T2, T3]) { Option.some[CategoryEquivalence[T0, T1, T2, T3]](x0) != CategoryEquivalence.new[T0, T1, T2, T3](x1, x2, x3, x4, x5, x6) or x0.backward = x2 }[O1, M1, O2, M2](e, forward, backward, unit_fwd, unit_bwd, counit_fwd, counit_bwd)

goal: CategoryEquivalence.constraint[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward, e.unit_fwd, e.unit_bwd, e.counit_fwd, e.counit_bwd)

goal: category_equivalence_cats_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward) = (e.forward.src_cat = e.backward.dst_cat and e.forward.dst_cat = e.backward.src_cat)

proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T0, T1], x2: Functor[T2, T3, T0, T1]) { (identity_functor[T0, T1](x0.src_cat) = x1.src_functor and Option.some[Functor[T0, T1, T0, T1]](x1.dst_functor) = compose_functor[T0, T1, T2, T3, T0, T1](x2, x0)) = category_equivalence_unit_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x2, x1) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.unit_fwd, e.backward)

goal: category_equivalence_counit_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward, e.counit_fwd)

category_equivalence_counit_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward, e.counit_fwd) = (compose_functor[O2, M2, O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward) = Option.some(e.counit_fwd.src_functor) and e.counit_fwd.dst_functor = identity_functor[O2, M2](e.forward.dst_cat))
proof: function[T0, T1, T3, T4](x0: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T0, T1], x1: Functor[T3, T4, T0, T1], x2: Functor[T0, T1, T3, T4]) { (Option.some[Functor[T0, T1, T0, T1]](x0.src_functor) = compose_functor[T0, T1, T3, T4, T0, T1](x1, x2) and identity_functor[T0, T1](x1.dst_cat) = x0.dst_functor) = category_equivalence_counit_axiom[T3, T4, T0, T1](x1, x2, x0) }[O2, M2, O1, M1](e.counit_fwd, e.forward, e.backward)

goal: is_category_equivalence[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward, e.unit_fwd, e.unit_bwd, e.counit_fwd, e.counit_bwd) = (category_equivalence_cats_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward) and category_equivalence_unit_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward, e.unit_fwd) and is_natural_isomorphism_pair[O1, M1, O1, M1](e.unit_fwd, e.unit_bwd) and category_equivalence_counit_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward, e.counit_fwd) and is_natural_isomorphism_pair[O2, M2, O2, M2](e.counit_fwd, e.counit_bwd))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T2, T3, T0, T1], x2: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T0, T1], x3: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T0, T1], x4: NaturalTransformation[T2, T3, T2, T3], x5: NaturalTransformation[T2, T3, T2, T3]) { (category_equivalence_cats_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1) and category_equivalence_unit_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2) and is_natural_isomorphism_pair[T0, T1, T0, T1](x2, x3) and category_equivalence_counit_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x4) and is_natural_isomorphism_pair[T2, T3, T2, T3](x4, x5)) = is_category_equivalence[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2, x3, x4, x5) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward, e.unit_fwd, e.unit_bwd, e.counit_fwd, e.counit_bwd)

goal: category_equivalence_counit_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward, e.counit_fwd)

category_equivalence_counit_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward, e.counit_fwd) = (compose_functor[O2, M2, O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward) = Option.some(e.counit_fwd.src_functor) and e.counit_fwd.dst_functor = identity_functor[O2, M2](e.forward.dst_cat))
proof: function[T0, T1, T3, T4](x0: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T0, T1], x1: Functor[T3, T4, T0, T1], x2: Functor[T0, T1, T3, T4]) { (Option.some[Functor[T0, T1, T0, T1]](x0.src_functor) = compose_functor[T0, T1, T3, T4, T0, T1](x1, x2) and identity_functor[T0, T1](x1.dst_cat) = x0.dst_functor) = category_equivalence_counit_axiom[T3, T4, T0, T1](x1, x2, x0) }[O2, M2, O1, M1](e.counit_fwd, e.forward, e.backward)

goal: is_category_equivalence[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward, e.unit_fwd, e.unit_bwd, e.counit_fwd, e.counit_bwd) = (category_equivalence_cats_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward) and category_equivalence_unit_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward, e.unit_fwd) and is_natural_isomorphism_pair[O1, M1, O1, M1](e.unit_fwd, e.unit_bwd) and category_equivalence_counit_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward, e.counit_fwd) and is_natural_isomorphism_pair[O2, M2, O2, M2](e.counit_fwd, e.counit_bwd))

function[T0, T1, T2, T3, T5, T6](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T5, T6, T2, T3], x2: Functor[T0, T1, T5, T6]) { Option.some[Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3]](x0) != compose_functor[T0, T1, T5, T6, T2, T3](x1, x2) or x0.src_cat = x2.src_cat }[O, M, O, M, O, M](h, identity_functor[O, M](c), identity_functor[O, M](c))

function[T0, T1, T2, T3, T5, T6](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T5, T6, T2, T3], x2: Functor[T0, T1, T5, T6]) { Option.some[Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3]](x0) != compose_functor[T0, T1, T5, T6, T2, T3](x1, x2) or x0.dst_cat = x1.dst_cat }[O, M, O, M, O, M](h, identity_functor[O, M](c), identity_functor[O, M](c))

goal: h.obj_map = compose[O, O, O](identity_functor[O, M](c).obj_map, identity_functor[O, M](c).obj_map)
h.mor_map = compose[M, M, M](identity_functor[O, M](c).mor_map, identity_functor[O, M](c).mor_map)
exists(k0: Functor[O, M, O, M]) { compose_functor[O, M, O, M, O, M](identity_functor[O, M](c), identity_functor[O, M](c)) = Option.some(k0) }
compose_functor[O, M, O, M, O, M](identity_functor[O, M](c), identity_functor[O, M](c)) = Option.some(identity_functor[O, M](c))
identity_nat_trans[O, M, O, M](identity_functor[O, M](c)).src_functor = identity_functor[O, M](c)
identity_nat_trans[O, M, O, M](identity_functor[O, M](c)).dst_functor = identity_functor[O, M](c)
